name: rtl-module
description: RTL module design: interface → internals → testbench → sim loop → lint

tasks.content: Define module interface (ports, parameters, reset polarity)
tasks.detail: Specify: module name, input/output ports with widths, parameters with defaults, clock/reset convention (sync/async, active-high/low). No implementation yet.
Write the RTL body. Rules: nonblocking (<=) in always_ff, blocking (=) in always_comb. All flip-flops must have reset. No latches.
Instantiate DUT, drive clk/rst, apply stimulus vectors, use $display to print PASS/FAIL. Include $dumpfile/$dumpvars for waveform capture.
Run: bash scripts/sim.sh tb_<module>.sv. Fix all errors and warnings before marking done.
Run: bash scripts/lint.sh <module>.sv. Fix all lint errors, then warnings.
